name: agent-specs
description: Shareable Claude Code plugins for spec-driven engineering workflows.

plugins.name: spec-kit
plugins.description: The spec phase of an AI SDLC as one plugin: product spec -> technical spec + hard/soft constraints (+ design contract for UI features) -> up-front acceptance plan + test-first build plan, linked by a PR-* traceability spine. Works greenfield or brownfield (feature-addition and behavior-change). Run any phase as a one-off skill, audit existing tests or CI, do a full run, or publish the plans to Linear/Jira.
